directions.name: Trade Authority
directions.description: Dark near-black header with a large bold white headline and prominent orange phone CTA. A tight trust-badge strip sits immediately below. Services grid is dense and information-rich with sharp card edges and orange hover accents. Sections alternate white and light grey. Typography leans heavy with Raleway at ultra-bold weights for muscular authority.
directions.rationale: The orange-and-dark combination is proven in the trades space — instantly readable, maximum conversion density. Closest in spirit to jimmysparkselectrical.com.au.

directions.name: Neighbourhood Pro
directions.description: Deep navy replaces black for a more considered trustworthy feel. Split hero: bold headline left, phone number and star-rating badge right. Trust signals as inline stat callouts (500+ reviews, 10 years, 24/7) rather than icon badges. Service cards have subtle drop shadows and 12px rounded corners. Amber CTAs pop against navy. Generous spacing — the page breathes.
directions.rationale: Navy and amber reads as reliable and established without the rawness of pure black. Strong for homeowners who want a professional outfit, not just a sole trader.

directions.name: The Local Promise
directions.description: Bold serif typographic hero: 'Your local [Suburb] plumber. On time. Done properly.' — no background image, the brand promise IS the hero. Teal accent is unexpected in the trades space and instantly distinctive. Spacious, warm-cream background. Service cards are rounded (20px) and generous. The founding family story gets a dedicated story block. Fraunces shifts weight optically across sizes.
directions.rationale: Stands out in search results where every other plumber site is black-and-orange. The serif and teal combination communicates quality over cheap-and-fast. Best for attracting the 35–65 homeowner who values trust over price.
